title: Aligarh Pit Death: CCTV Captures Labourer Buried Alive As Soil Slips Into Trench, CM Yogi Takes Cognisance | VIDEO
description: A 30-year-old labourer died in Aligarh after a road caved in during pipeline repairs, with the viral CCTV triggering outrage, prompting CM Yogi Adityanath to order a probe, form a 3-member panel, and announce Rs 5 lakh aid.
